jobs.artifact_behavior: Returns deterministic metadata and previews for files or directories under an approved root.
Reads a file under an approved root and returns deterministic content plus file metadata.
Searches file names and optionally contents under an approved root without mutating files.
Creates or overwrites a file under an approved root and returns deterministic write metadata.
Applies deterministic text replacements to a file and returns before/after previews.
Copies a file within an approved root and returns deterministic source/destination metadata.
Moves a file within an approved root and returns deterministic source/destination metadata.
Returns a short preview of a file under an approved root without mutating it.
Consumes one or more Office artifacts and returns structured inspection data. Optional JSON export artifact may be returned.
Consumes two or more workbook artifacts and returns one materialized XLSX artifact with path metadata.
Consumes one workbook artifact and returns one transformed workbook artifact with path metadata.
Consumes one DOCX template and returns one filled DOCX artifact with path metadata.
Consumes a structured outline or source artifact and returns one materialized PPTX artifact with path metadata.
Consumes one source artifact and returns structured table summaries plus an optional export artifact.
Consumes one source artifact and returns one preview artifact with path metadata.
May emit screenshots, downloads, or trace artifacts in addition to structured task output.
Returns structured extracted documents and may emit an exported artifact.
Returns one materialized capture artifact with path metadata.
Returns one downloaded artifact with checksum and path metadata when materialized.
May emit produced artifacts plus stdout and stderr in structured output.
Consumes one or more source artifacts and returns one or more transformed artifacts.
Returns findings and may emit chart or report artifacts.
Consumes one or more source artifacts and returns one report artifact.
Returns ranked search results and may emit an exported result artifact.
Returns fetched item metadata and may emit an aggregate artifact.
Returns one extraction artifact and structured field coverage.
Returns one crawl artifact and structured crawl metrics.
Produces a structured device-state snapshot and may emit one screenshot artifact when requested.
Returns structured metadata for windows visible on the current device.
Launches a local application and returns process or initial window metadata.
Brings a matching window to the foreground and returns the focused window metadata.
Produces one screenshot artifact with path metadata and structured capture details.
Injects a pointer click and returns the normalized action metadata.
Injects text into the focused or targeted window and returns normalized typing metadata.
Sends a keyboard shortcut and returns normalized key metadata.
Reads the device clipboard and returns normalized clipboard content or a materialized artifact for binary data.
Writes text or file references to the device clipboard and returns normalized write metadata.
Sends a local desktop notification and returns delivery metadata.
Returns current audio volume, mute state, and available playback devices. No artifacts are emitted.
Adjusts audio volume or mute state and returns the applied settings. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns current display configuration including brightness and resolution for all connected monitors. No artifacts are emitted.
Adjusts display brightness or resolution and returns the applied display settings. No artifacts are emitted.
Initiates a power state transition (sleep, hibernate, shutdown, restart, or lock) and returns confirmation. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns the status of all or a named network interface including WiFi SSID and VPN state. No artifacts are emitted.
Connects to or disconnects from a WiFi network or VPN and returns connection result metadata. No artifacts are emitted.
Applies a snap or tile layout to one or more windows and returns affected window metadata. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns the list of virtual desktops with their names, indices, and window counts. No artifacts are emitted.
Switches to a virtual desktop by ID or direction and returns the new active desktop metadata. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns a point-in-time CPU usage snapshot with optional per-core breakdown. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns a point-in-time RAM and swap usage snapshot with optional top-consumer process list. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns disk usage stats for all mounted partitions or a specific path. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns cumulative network I/O counters for all interfaces or a named interface. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns current battery charge, status, and time-remaining estimate. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns a sorted list of running processes with CPU and memory usage. No artifacts are emitted.
Terminates a process by PID or name and returns kill confirmation metadata. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns a structured hardware inventory report for the requested components. No artifacts are emitted.
Sends messages to a local LLM and returns the generated text response with token usage metadata. No artifacts are emitted.
Generates dense vector embeddings for text inputs using a local embedding model. No artifacts are emitted.
Queries available local LLM runtimes and returns a structured list of available models with tier and capability metadata. No artifacts are emitted.
Reads files, chunks text, embeds with a local model, and stores in a named RAG collection. No artifacts are emitted.
Embeds the query and returns the top-K ranked text chunks from the named RAG collection. No artifacts are emitted.
Accepts a batch of chat jobs for asynchronous execution and returns a batch_id for status polling. No artifacts are emitted.
Polls the status of a batch identified by batch_id and returns per-job completion state. No artifacts are emitted.
Creates a recurring schedule record in the in-memory store and returns the full schedule record including its generated ID and next fire time. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns all stored schedule records, optionally filtered by scope group or enabled state. No artifacts are emitted.
Removes a schedule record by ID and returns a deletion confirmation. No artifacts are emitted.
Creates a threshold alert rule in the in-memory store and returns the full alert record including its generated ID. No artifacts are emitted.
Enables or disables focus mode, optionally blocking specified apps and muting notifications for a set duration. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns application usage statistics for the requested time window. No artifacts are emitted.
Creates a named multi-step workflow in the in-memory store and returns the full workflow record. No artifacts are emitted.
Queues all steps of a stored workflow and returns the run ID with queued job IDs. No artifacts are emitted.
Creates, logs a value for, or deletes a habit record. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns habit completion statistics for the requested time window. No artifacts are emitted.
Runs an autonomous multi-step task via Open Interpreter. Returns a session ID, step trace, and final output. No artifacts are emitted unless the task explicitly writes files.
Executes a code snippet in the specified language and returns stdout, stderr, and exit code. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns a list of active interpreter sessions. No artifacts are emitted.
Captures audio from the microphone and returns a WAV artifact ID for downstream transcription.
Transcribes an audio artifact to text using Whisper STT. Emits no output artifacts.
Synthesises text to speech and returns a WAV audio artifact.
Starts a persistent background wake word session. No artifacts are emitted.
Stops the active wake word detection session. No artifacts are emitted.
Scans all running processes against the security whitelist and returns a structured report of suspicious or non-whitelisted entries. No artifacts are emitted.
Adds or removes process names or SHA-256 hashes from the in-memory security whitelist. No artifacts are emitted.
Enumerates active TCP connections and flags suspicious remote ports and states. No artifacts are emitted.
Computes SHA-256 hashes for a set of file paths and diffs them against a stored baseline. No artifacts are emitted.
Creates a named SHA-256 hash baseline for a set of file paths. No artifacts are emitted.
Adds, removes, or lists Windows Firewall rules via netsh. No artifacts are emitted.
Activates security lockdown mode: kills non-whitelisted processes, blocks outbound connections, and locks the workstation screen. No artifacts are emitted.
Starts a new agent run and returns the run_id. No artifacts are emitted.
Executes one step of an active agent run and returns step result. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns current status and run list for an agent. No artifacts are emitted.
Pauses an active agent run, preserving state. No artifacts are emitted.
Resumes a paused agent run. No artifacts are emitted.
Updates the configuration of a registered agent. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns a list of calendar events within the specified date range. No artifacts are emitted.
Creates a calendar event and returns the event ID and metadata. No artifacts are emitted.
Updates an existing calendar event and returns the list of applied changes. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns free time slots that are available for all requested attendees. No artifacts are emitted.
Generates a structured meeting preparation brief with agenda, key topics, and attendee context. No artifacts are emitted.
Searches the inbox using Gmail query syntax. Returns matching message summaries. No artifacts are emitted.
Reads a single message by ID, returning full body, headers, and attachment metadata. No artifacts are emitted.
Creates a draft in Gmail without sending. Returns draft_id and message_id. No artifacts are emitted.
Sends an existing draft or a composed message. Always requires user approval. No artifacts are emitted.
Applies or removes Gmail labels from a message. No artifacts are emitted.
Lists threads matching an optional query, grouped with participant and date metadata. No artifacts are emitted.
Searches news and web sources for articles matching the query. Returns ranked articles with relevance scores. No artifacts are emitted.
Extracts structured profile data from a company, person, or job posting URL. No artifacts are emitted.
Checks a web page for content changes since the last monitoring run. No artifacts are emitted.
Enriches a contact record with web-sourced data including role, company size, industry, and LinkedIn. No artifacts are emitted.
Monitors job postings at specified companies and returns postings matching the provided keywords. No artifacts are emitted.
Gathers competitive intelligence on a company including key facts, recent news, products, and team signals. No artifacts are emitted.
Creates a new contact record in the in-memory CRM store and returns the full contact record.
Updates contact fields and returns the updated record with a list of applied changes.
Returns a filtered list of contacts with stage counts. No artifacts are emitted.
Moves a contact to a new pipeline stage and records the transition in stage history.
Appends an interaction note to a contact record. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns matching contacts for a full-text query across configurable fields. No artifacts are emitted.
Returns a pipeline summary including hot leads, stale contacts, and recent stage movements. No artifacts are emitted.
Parses PDF, DOCX, TXT, or MD file and returns extracted text, document structure, tables, and metadata. No output artifacts emitted.
Extracts and classifies legal clauses from NDA, MSA, SOW, or contract documents with risk level assessment. No output artifacts emitted.
Analyzes document compliance against ISO 26262, ASPICE, IEC 61508, or ISO 21434 and returns compliance score with gap analysis. No output artifacts emitted.
Compares two document versions and returns a structured diff with change significance classification. No output artifacts emitted.
Generates a structured report from a template (evidence gap, compliance summary, NDA analysis, proposal, custom) and writes it to the specified output path.
Navigates to a URL in the user's Chrome browser. Returns page title and status code.
Clicks an element on the page by CSS selector.
Types text into an input element on the page.
Evaluates JavaScript in the page context and returns the result.
Waits for a CSS selector to appear on the page.
Likes a post on the specified social media platform.
Posts a comment on a social media post.
Reposts/shares a post on the specified platform.
Creates a new post on the specified platform.
Follows a user on the specified platform.
Scans the feed on a social media platform for engagement opportunities.
Generates a daily digest of all social media engagement actions.
Lists time tracking entries from Toggl.
Creates a new time tracking entry.
Generates a time tracking summary report.
Syncs time tracking data with external service.
Lists files in a Google Drive folder.
Downloads a file from Google Drive to local storage.
Checks a Google Drive folder for new or modified files since last check.
Syncs a Google Drive folder with local storage, downloading new/changed files.
